metadata.title: Mantus Online
metadata.description: Enter the world of Mantus Online.

languages.label: Language
languages.saveFailed: Language could not be saved. Please try again.

configuration.supabase: Authentication is not configured. Add the Supabase URL and anonymous key to client/.env.local.

auth.enterWorld: Sign in to enter the world
auth.confirmationNotice: Check your email to confirm your account.

errors.invalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email before signing in.
errors.emailAlreadyExists: An account already exists for this email.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.
errors.providerDisabled: This sign-in method is currently unavailable.

hero.tagline: A ruthless old-school world, forged anew
hero.subtitle: Mantus Online is a free classic-style 2D MMORPG: one persistent open world where every step, every trade, and every battle is real — and everything you earn can be lost.
hero.note: Free to play — runs in your browser
hero.artAlt: Key art of the world of Mantus

features.title: Forged for the Fearless
features.subtitle: Everything that made classic MMORPGs matter — rebuilt with modern craft and a server that never cheats.

world.title: A Living Open World
world.description: Explore a hand-crafted realm of cities, dungeons, and wilderness. Hunting grounds are contested, resources are finite, and the map remembers what you did.

combat.title: Classic Tactical Combat
combat.description: Position, timing, and preparation decide fights. Master melee, ranged, and elemental magic — and respect the creatures that are stronger than you.

economy.title: A Player-Driven Economy
economy.description: Every item is earned, traded, or crafted by players. Buy and sell on the market, bid at auctions, bank your gold, and own a house in the world.

social.title: Rise Together
social.description: Found guilds, form hunting parties, track friends with your VIP list, and carve your names into the history of the realm — or go to war over it.

vocations.title: Choose Your Path
vocations.subtitle: Five vocations, each with its own weapons, magic, and way of surviving the world. Choose wisely — mastery is a long road.

news.title: Chronicles of Mantus
news.subtitle: Dispatches from the developers and the world itself.

gatesOpen.title: The Gates of Mantus Open
gatesOpen.excerpt: The first world goes live. Create your free account, choose a vocation, and take your first steps into the realm.

marketAndHouses.title: Market Stalls & House Deeds
marketAndHouses.excerpt: The great market opens its doors and houses across the realm can now be bid on, owned, and furnished.

roadToWar.title: The Road to Guild Wars
roadToWar.excerpt: A look at what is coming next: guild banners, contested territory, and the systems that will decide who rules the wilds.

media.title: Glimpses of the World
media.subtitle: Scenes from the realm, captured by those who survived them.

screenshots.combat: A party battles a dragon in its lair

callToAction.title: Your Legend Awaits
callToAction.subtitle: Creating an account is free and takes less than a minute. The world, however, will take years to conquer.

characters.empty: No characters yet. Create your first hero to enter the world.
characters.name: Character Name
characters.nameRules: Letters and spaces only, starting with a letter

Knight.name: Knight
Knight.description: Stalwart front-line fighter with heavy armour and melee mastery.

Paladin.name: Paladin
Paladin.description: Versatile ranged hunter armed with bows, spears, and holy magic.

Sorcerer.name: Sorcerer
Sorcerer.description: Fragile master of raw destructive magic and summoning.

Druid.name: Druid
Druid.description: Healer and nature mage wielding ice and life-saving support.

Monk.name: Monk
Monk.description: Disciplined martial artist specializing in fist combat.

Exalted Monk.name: Exalted Monk
Exalted Monk.description: Promoted monk with stronger health regeneration.

gems.selectGem: Select a gem to inspect its modifiers and actions.

reveal.title: Gem Revelation
reveal.help: Revealing a gem rolls random mods: lesser gems get one basic mod, regular gems two, greater gems two basic mods and one supreme mod. Costs are paid from your bank.

gems.empty: No gems match your filters. Reveal gems to grow your collection.
